hero.headline: Ireland's Finest Pints.

hero.description: The Emerald Pour brings authentic Guinness draught, curated Irish whiskey, and classic pub fare to weddings, corporate events, and celebrations across the Carolinas.

about.title: More Than
about.body: We create unforgettable experiences with top-notch service, authentic Irish vibes, and a whole lot of craic.
about.body2: From Guinness on tap to premium Irish whiskey, our mobile pub brings the spirit of Dublin to weddings, corporate events, and celebrations across North and South Carolina.

mobile.title: Mobile & Flexible
mobile.desc: We bring the pub to you

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about booking our mobile Irish pub

q1.a: We serve all of North and South Carolina from our Charlotte base. Travel logistics depend on your venue — we'll confirm details when you book.

q2.a: Every package includes our mobile bar setup, professional bartenders, glassware, and a curated Irish drink menu. Higher tiers add premium spirits and extended service hours.

q3.a: Yes — we are fully licensed and carry liability insurance. We handle procurement, setup, service, and breakdown.

q4.q: How far in advance should I book?
q4.a: Peak season weekends (March–October) fill 4–8 weeks out. We recommend booking as early as possible, especially for St. Patrick's Day and wedding season.

q5.q: How do I secure my date?
q5.a: Submit a booking request with your event details. We'll confirm availability and walk you through next steps to hold your date.

q6.a: Our mobile pub operates in covered outdoor areas and tents. Weather-related rescheduling is free — we'll work with your venue to find the best setup.

metricsHints.revenue: Sum of all succeeded Stripe payments (deposits + balances).
metricsHints.netProfit: Total revenue minus inventory COGS valuation.
metricsHints.roi: Return on inventory investment: (net profit ÷ COGS) × 100.
metricsHints.cogs: Current inventory value: quantity × unit cost per SKU.
metricsHints.conversion: Share of bookings marked completed vs total bookings.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: We collect information you provide when booking our mobile Irish pub services, including your name, email, phone number, event details, and payment information processed securely through Stripe.
privacy.s2Body: Your data is used to process bookings, send confirmations, manage contracts, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.s3Body: All data is stored with tenant-level isolation using PostgreSQL Row Level Security. Payment data is handled exclusively by Stripe and never stored on our servers.
privacy.s4Body: We use essential cookies for authentication and locale preferences. We do not use third-party advertising cookies.
privacy.s5Body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting bookings@emeraldpour.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: A deposit is required to secure your event date. Payment details are confirmed when you complete your booking.
terms.s2Body: Cancellations made more than 30 days before the event receive a full deposit refund. Cancellations within 30 days forfeit the deposit. Weather-related cancellations will be rescheduled at no additional cost.
terms.s3Body: The Emerald Pour serves North and South Carolina. Delivery logistics are based on your venue location from our Charlotte base.
terms.s4Body: We carry full liability insurance. Clients are responsible for obtaining any required venue permits. Guests must be 21+ for alcohol service with valid ID.

footer.tagline: Premium mobile Irish pub catering across the Carolinas
